chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 89 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 26.09.2023 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 04.03.2024 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Already a statement dated 26.09.2023, supported by affidavits of the petitioners, for withdrawal of this petition is on record. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Abdul Basit
